rows.requirement: Create Phase 3 detail document before implementation
evidence: Phase 3 detail document defines objective, scope lock, functional scope, non-scope, domain model, API contracts, UI surfaces, E2E scenarios, tests, fixtures, exit gate, risks, and decisions
Scope is frozen around CRM intake, readiness, feasibility, and audited project draft creation without external CRM adapter dependency

rows.requirement: Define finite closed implementation tasks for P3
evidence: Functional scope table defines P3-001 through P3-010 with owner/module, expected behavior, acceptance criteria, E2E references, verification, task non-scope, and done evidence
Phase 3 requirements matrix pre-creates every P3 row as blocked until implementation provides fresh command evidence

rows.requirement: Define mandatory E2E matrix and fixtures for P3
evidence: E2E-020 through E2E-024 are mapped to Phase 3 roles, fixtures, test paths, expected results, and required assertion pattern
Verifier owns the exact required_e2e contract and ledger test_path contract for P3-001 through P3-010 so final phase exit cannot pass with deleted, prose-only, or arbitrary phase3 E2E references
